sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
No impact - clicking on the cross pattern r dot only changed the HUD. Let me reconsider the puzzle.
So far I've found that:
1. Clicking on N shapes or compartment walls in the top big container toggles the small green N container
2. Clicking on Y shapes or compartment walls in the bottom big container toggles the yellow Y bar
3. Clicking on r dots in sources or cross patterns only changes the HUD
The only gameplay-changing actions are clicking on the big container elements. But these just toggle the sources back and forth.
Wait, let me reconsider the structure. The big containers have:
- Top container (g-colored, 36 pixels): contains two c-colored compartments and a G-colored divider
  - Left compartment (c, 18 pixels): contains N shape (7 pixels)
  - Right compartment (c, 18 pixels): contains N shape (7 pixels)
  - Divider (G, 5 pixels): between the two compartments
- Bottom container (g-colored, 36 pixels): contains two c-colored compartments and a G-colored divider
  - Top compartment (c, 18 pixels): contains Y shape (7 pixels)
  - Bottom compartment (c, 18 pixels): contains Y shape (7 pixels)
  - Divider (G, 5 pixels): between the two compartments
And the sources:
- Small green container: G (3 pixels) + N (5 pixels, currently partial) + r (1 pixel)
- Yellow bar: G (3 pixels) + Y (23 pixels) + r (1 pixel)
Hmm, let me think about this differently. Maybe the G-colored dividers in the big containers are clickable and do something different?
Or maybe I need to click on the small green container's G wall (node 1)?
Let me try clicking on the G wall of the small green container at (9, 27).
Actually, wait. Let me think about what the G-colored elements are:
- Node 1: G, 3 pixels, boundary [[9, 27], [11, 27]] - this is the left wall of the small green container
- Node 11: G, 5 pixels, boundary [[19, 42], [23, 42]] - this is the divider between N compartments
- Node 15: G, 3 pixels, boundary [[27, 9], [27, 11]] - this is the top of the yellow bar
- Node 21: G, 5 pixels, boundary [[41, 22], [41, 26]] - this is the divider between Y compartments
Let me try clicking on the G divider in the top container (node 11).

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model updated:
- Clicking cross pattern r dots has no gameplay impact (HUD only)
- Only clicking big container elements (shapes or walls) causes gameplay changes
- These toggle the corresponding source container between two states
- Need to find what actually completes the level
Plan: Try clicking on the G-colored divider between compartments in the top container (node 11 at col 42).
